title: Claude FM 🎵 music for thinking and building
summary: Claude FM is a music streaming service created by Anthropic for thinking and building work. The content is curated by musicians to support focused creative and technical tasks.
writeup: The video introduces Claude FM, a music streaming service from Anthropic intended to accompany thinking and building work. The tracks are curated by musicians to support focused creative and technical tasks. The takeaway is that Anthropic is offering a dedicated audio backdrop aimed at concentration during creative and engineering work rather than general listening.
